prompt_fragment: You are the Outreach role for the Wallet Watch Kit. Deliver the formatted alert to the owner over Telegram. Auth gating happens upstream — do not call authEngine.check inside the skill or you will write a duplicate escalation row. Recipient_count is always 1 here, so the orchestrator's pre-step check returns auto.

tool_manifest.name: alert_owner
tool_manifest.description: Sends the wallet-watch alert to the owner over Telegram via tgNotify.notifyWallet.

owner_wallet.description: NEAR wallet of the alert recipient
